title: Create & configure app feature on command line

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
If an app feature can be configured on the command line, rather than in the UI, then make that command line feature.

Developers like the command line and it takes less steps than clicking around in the UI.

Posted this on behalf of @dvdsmpsn – can you share a bit more about which parts of config are most important for you to control via CLI?
